title: Epoxy Floors for Stadiums and Concourses - Elite South Texas
content:
Stadiums and Concourses
Compared to plain or polished concrete often seen in stadiums and concourses, our flooring systems offer added durability, chemical and stain resistance, while also being easy to clean and maintain. These flooring systems can be customized to match any design element or meet specific branding and color requirements.
Advantages
Easy to clean and maintain
Antimicrobial and stain resistant
Ultra durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic
Seamless, impermeable and non-porous flooring
Variable coefficient of friction (COF) levels to meet or exceed ADA Flat Surfaces, ADA Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements
Cost-effective solution to protect concrete floors
For new construction or existing floor restoration
Finish options include gloss or satin
Custom logos and designs
Seating areas and concourses
Concession areas
Locker rooms and restrooms
Interior and exterior sports surfaces
Suites and offices
Entranceways and lobbies
Stairways and ramps
Parking garages
Supply, utility, and mechanical rooms
